data.summary: The evidence provided does not sufficiently validate the requirement for quiet hours compliance.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Quiet hours compliance (don't text at 3am)'. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is implemented or enforced. The linked use case mentions the need for quiet hours compliance, but there are no specific details or mechanisms provided to verify that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or mechanisms that enforce quiet hours compliance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for quiet hours compliance
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of quiet hours compliance.
